/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/shell_ulti.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/shell_ulti.dir/shell_ulti_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell_ulti.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell_ulti.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell_ulti.dir/shell.cc.o -o shell_ulti  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
